theres no real point rerolling in this game because

1. it takes a million years
2. you get way more pulls by doing the story anyway
Just pull 3 more copies of gmurphy (e3) and 3 copies of thais (e2)
1 copy of thais and tulu wheel (maybe lily wheel for future investment)
and ur account is set all the way to level 60
dont get too hung up on team comps for now just try different things
you only need a real team starting at chapter 5-6
if u are struggling use costco wheels (gluttony, frenzy, emerge)
get 40% more hp and buy op relics from shop

Sanga’s shields aren’t worth her cost. Aurita isnt used in comps outside Corpo(in 9/10 cases). If you are doing Arc 1 ruleset, running Awakeners like Celeste/Goliath/Tulu/Caecus/Faros/Miryiam/Aigis would be good. If Arc 2 rulesets, run Lemurians, Goliath/Faros/Miryiam/Tulu with Top tier supports, Thais/Clem/Horla/Hameln. Oh, and Murphy, works well with Fauxborn. Posse can be Mouse or Tides.
